channel.title: 3D on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD
channel.description: Recent content in 3D on Bogdan Penkovsky, PhD

item.title: 3D Printing Tutorial: Designing a Micro Drone Frame
item.description: Here is a step by step tutorial on how to design objects for 3D printing using OpenSCAD. We illustrate the design process by creating a micro quadcopter frame. This small drone bears the code name of Beatle-1. After following the tutorial you will be able to conceive your own designs for 3D printing.
